title: Pilot: improve portfolio summary clarity with explicit gain/loss legend
problem: Users can misread PnL colors without legend context in summary area; this reduces confidence in data interpretation.
evidence: observed ux friction in manual review
benchmark comparison: legend is present in competing tools
proposed_change: Add a concise legend near summary cards clarifying gain/loss semantics and neutral states; keep scope to one user-facing component.
expected_benefit: Higher clarity in portfolio interpretation and reduced confusion-driven support questions, measurable via feedback and reduced clarification actions.
success_metrics: Legend visible and understandable in mobile+desktop
non_goals: No redesign of overall summary layout
rollback_plan: Revert summary legend commit and restore previous UI snapshot.
